en: All right, never ever have I been arrested.
Never ever have I gotten a tattoo that I regret.
Never ever have I joined the Mile High Club.
Never ever have I lied to get a job.
ja: フロスさえ必要ないんだ。
vi: Tôi còn không cần dùng chỉ nha khoa.

en: Come on. How would you lie to get a job?
I lie constantly to get a job. Never ever have I gotten out of a speeding ticket
